sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro, Soft Piano]
She walks in grace, her hands hold light
A heart of gold, a soul so bright
[Verse 1]
She wakes before the sun can rise
Lifting love with weary eyes
With steady hands, she builds our home
No fear, no doubt—she stands alone
[Pre-Chorus]
Strength and honor clothe her days
With wisdom soft as morning haze
[Chorus]
Oh, she is far above rubies,
A crown upon my life
With gentle strength, she moves me,
A faithful heart, my bride
Her laughter sings like rivers
Her kindness lights the way
Oh, she is far above rubies,
And love will never fade
[Verse 2]
She sees beyond the fleeting now
Sows with faith where time allows
She lifts the fallen, mends the torn
A love so deep, so gently worn
[Pre-Chorus]
Her words, a song that calms the storm
Her hands, a refuge, safe and warm
[Chorus]
Oh, she is far above rubies,
A crown upon my life
With gentle strength, she moves me,
A faithful heart, my bride
Her laughter sings like rivers
Her kindness lights the way
Oh, she is far above rubies,
And love will never fade
[Verse 3, Emotional Build]
She walks the path the Lord has traced
With open arms and fearless grace
Through darkest nights, through winds that rise
She holds her faith, she lifts her eyes
[Bridge, Swelling Strings]
Through every trial, through every night
She stands with faith, she walks in light
Her children rise, they call her blessed
Her love outshines the very best
[Final Chorus, Climactic]
Oh, she is far above rubies,
A gift sent from above
With steady hands, she holds me,
Wrapped in eternal love
Her laughter sings like rivers
Her kindness lights the way
Oh, she is far above rubies,
And love will never fade
[Outro, Gentle Piano]
She walks in grace, her hands hold light
A heart of gold, a soul so bright
A faithful heart, my bride, she is mine
She walks in grace, her hands hold light
A heart of gold, a soul so bright
A faithful heart, my bride, she is mine
